title: European Growth Stocks Insiders Are Eager To Own
content:
As the pan-European STOXX Europe 600 Index remains broadly flat amid geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties, investors are keenly observing growth companies with strong insider ownership as potential opportunities. In such a market environment, stocks where insiders hold significant stakes can be attractive due to the alignment of interests between company management and shareholders, often signaling confidence in the company's long-term prospects.

Top 10 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership In Europe

Name Insider Ownership Earnings Growth Magnora (OB:MGN) 10.4% 146.1% KebNi (OM:KEBNI B) 11.8% 82.7% Hacksaw (OM:HACK) 13.2% 24.8% Envipco Holding (ENXTAM:ENVI) 19.5% 46.5% Elliptic Laboratories (OB:ELABS) 19.8% 125.1% CTT Systems (OM:CTT) 17.4% 47.1% Clavister Holding AB (publ.) (OM:CLAV) 18% 81.8% Circus (XTRA:CA1) 21.9% 88% Bonesupport Holding (OM:BONEX) 10.3% 34.5% Bergen Carbon Solutions (OB:BCS) 11.9% 55.5%

Click here to see the full list of 212 stocks from our Fast Growing European Companies With High Insider Ownership screener.

We're going to check out a few of the best picks from our screener tool.

CapMan Oyj

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: CapMan Oyj is a leading Nordic private assets management and investment firm specializing in various investment strategies including private equity, venture capital, real estate, and infrastructure with a market cap of €316.09 million.

Operations: CapMan Oyj generates revenue through its diverse investment strategies, which include private equity, venture capital, real estate investments, and infrastructure projects.

Insider Ownership: 14.5%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 23% p.a.

CapMan Oyj exhibits significant insider ownership with more shares bought than sold in the past three months, indicating confidence from insiders. Despite a recent decline in net income for Q1 2026, the company's earnings are forecast to grow significantly above the Finnish market average at 23% annually. However, its dividend yield of 6.73% is not well covered by earnings or free cash flows, raising sustainability concerns despite expected revenue growth outpacing the Finnish market.

Get an in-depth perspective on CapMan Oyj's performance by reading our analyst estimates report here. The valuation report we've compiled suggests that CapMan Oyj's current price could be inflated.HLSE:CAPMAN Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

Hexatronic Group

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Hexatronic Group AB (publ) is a company that develops, manufactures, markets, and sells fiber communication solutions across Sweden, the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, and internationally with a market cap of SEK8.23 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: Hexatronic Group AB generates revenue through its development, manufacturing, marketing, and sales of fiber communication solutions in various markets including Sweden, the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, and internationally.

Insider Ownership: 11.1%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 49.6% p.a.

Hexatronic Group AB demonstrates high insider ownership, aligning with its forecasted revenue growth of 7.3% annually, outpacing the Swedish market. Despite a recent decline in quarterly sales and revenue, net income increased slightly to SEK 92 million. The company completed a SEK 600 million follow-on equity offering at SEK 38 per share. However, interest payments are not well covered by earnings and the share price has been highly volatile recently.

Click here and access our complete growth analysis report to understand the dynamics of Hexatronic Group. The valuation report we've compiled suggests that Hexatronic Group's current price could be quite moderate.OM:HTRO Ownership Breakdown as at May 2026

init innovation in traffic systems

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Init innovation in traffic systems SE, along with its subsidiaries, provides intelligent transportation systems solutions for public transportation both in Germany and internationally, with a market cap of €536.28 million.

Operations: The company generates revenue primarily from its Wireless Communications Equipment segment, amounting to €329.67 million.

Insider Ownership: 39.3%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 23.5% p.a.

Init Innovation in Traffic Systems SE shows strong insider alignment, with a recent AUD 615 million contract for Sydney's Opal network upgrade. The company's revenue is projected to grow at 11.5% annually, surpassing the German market average. Earnings are expected to rise significantly by 23.5% per year, driven by robust past performance and strategic index inclusion in Germany's SDAX. Trading slightly below fair value, Init offers potential growth despite slower than 20% revenue expansion forecasts.

title: European Growth Stocks With High Insider Ownership In April 2026
content:
As European markets face heightened geopolitical risks and economic uncertainties, traditionally defensive sectors have shown resilience amidst the volatility. In this environment, growth companies with substantial insider ownership can be particularly appealing, as they often signal strong internal confidence and alignment with shareholder interests.

Top 10 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership In Europe

(OM:CLAV) 18% 116.2% Circus (XTRA:CA1) 21.9% 88% Bonesupport Holding (OM:BONEX) 10.3% 34.5% Bergen Carbon Solutions (OB:BCS) 10.2% 55.5%

Click here to see the full list of 212 stocks from our Fast Growing European Companies With High Insider Ownership screener.

Here we highlight a subset of our preferred stocks from the screener.

Altri SGPS

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Altri SGPS, S.A. is a company that produces and sells cellulosic fibers both in Portugal and internationally, with a market cap of €1.02 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue primarily comes from the production and commercialization of cellulosic fibers, amounting to €676.29 million.

Insider Ownership: 12.4%

Altri SGPS demonstrates potential for growth with forecasted annual earnings growth of 38.33%, outpacing the Portuguese market's 11.3%. However, recent earnings results show a decline, with full-year revenue at €702.8 million and net income at €21.4 million, both down from the previous year. Profit margins have also decreased to 3.2% from 12.8%. While insider ownership is high, there has been no substantial insider trading activity in the past three months.

Click here to discover the nuances of Altri SGPS with our detailed analytical future growth report. Insights from our recent valuation report point to the potential overvaluation of Altri SGPS shares in the market.ENXTLS:ALTR Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

P/F Bakkafrost

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: P/F Bakkafrost, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on the production and sale of salmon products across North America, Western Europe, Eastern Europe, Asia, and other international markets, with a market capitalization of NOK26.80 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segments in millions of DKK are: Services (920.52), Sales and Other (10,277.12), Farming Scotland (1,121.10), Freshwater Scotland (169.46), Farming Faroe Islands (4,050.71), Fishmeal, Oil and Feed (2,604.24), and Freshwater Faroe Islands (896.77).

Story Continues

Insider Ownership: 23.7%

P/F Bakkafrost is poised for significant growth, with earnings projected to rise 35.5% annually, surpassing the Norwegian market's 11.2%. Despite a recent dip in full-year net income to DKK 517.35 million from DKK 656.6 million, insider ownership remains strong without substantial trading activity in the last three months. Recent bylaw changes allow share buybacks up to 10% of capital, potentially enhancing shareholder value and aligning with growth ambitions despite slower revenue growth projections at 12.1%.

Click here and access our complete growth analysis report to understand the dynamics of P/F Bakkafrost. Our expertly prepared valuation report P/F Bakkafrost implies its share price may be lower than expected.OB:BAKKA Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

Medicover

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Medicover AB (publ) offers healthcare and diagnostic services in Poland, Sweden, and internationally, with a market cap of SEK31.71 billion.

Operations: Medicover generates revenue from healthcare services amounting to €1.17 billion and diagnostic services totaling €0.86 billion.

Insider Ownership: 11.3%

Medicover, with substantial insider buying and no significant selling in the past three months, is trading 68.9% below its estimated fair value. Analysts expect earnings to grow significantly at 23.9% annually over the next three years, outpacing the Swedish market's 8.4%. Recent Q1 2026 results show a rise in sales to €624.2 million from €578.1 million a year ago, supporting forecasts of faster revenue growth than the Swedish market's average rate.

Dive into the specifics of Medicover here with our thorough growth forecast report. According our valuation report, there's an indication that Medicover's share price might be on the cheaper side.OM:MCOV B Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

Moltiply Group

Insider Ownership: 23.9%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 31.7% p.a.

Moltiply Group's forecasted earnings growth of 31.7% annually surpasses the Italian market average, indicating strong potential despite a high debt level and declining profit margins from 9.1% to 4.2%. Recent earnings reveal increased sales at €695.89 million but decreased net income at €28.59 million compared to the previous year, reflecting operational challenges. Analysts agree on a potential stock price increase of 58.5%, though Return on Equity is expected to remain low at 19.4%.

Altarea

Operations: Altarea generates revenue through three primary segments: Trade (€246.20 million), Housing (€1.63 billion), and Commercial Property (IE) (€131.90 million).

Story Continues

Insider Ownership: 22.3%

Earnings Growth Forecast: 37.2% p.a.

Altarea's earnings are projected to grow significantly at 37.2% annually, outpacing the French market, although its Return on Equity is forecasted to remain modest at 13.3%. The company trades at good value relative to peers despite revenue growth of 7.2% being slower than desired for a high-growth profile. Recent strategic partnerships in AI and cloud data centers highlight its expanding footprint in digital infrastructure, yet financial stability is challenged by insufficient cash flow coverage for debt and dividends.

Operations: MilDef Group AB generates its revenue through the development, manufacturing, and sale of rugged IT solutions across various international markets including Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States, and Australia.

MilDef Group's recent financial performance highlights significant growth, with first-quarter sales reaching SEK 707.8 million, doubling from the previous year. The company has become profitable this year, and its earnings are forecasted to grow at 29.4% annually, surpassing the Swedish market average. title: Megan Holdings Limited Announces Closing of $8.3 Million Follow-on Public Offering
content:
Malaysia, Kuala Lumpur, Feb.  27, 2026  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --  Megan Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: MGN) (the “Company” or “Megan”), a Malaysia-based company principally engaged in the development, construction, and maintenance of aquaculture farms and related works, today announced the closing of its follow-on public offering (the “Offering”) of 20,750,000 Class A ordinary shares, par value US$0.0001 per share, at a public offering price of US$0.40 per share.

Gross proceeds to the Company, before deducting placement agent fees and other offering expenses, were US$8.3 million.

D. Boral Capital LLC acted as the exclusive placement agent in connection with the Offering. Ortoli Rosenstadt LLP acted as U.S. securities counsel to the Company. Loeb & Loeb LLP acted as U.S. securities counsel to the placement agent.

The securities described above were offered pursuant to a registration statement on Form F-1 (File No. 333-292850), as amended (the “Registration Statement”), which was declared effective by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the “SEC”) on February 23, 2026. The Offering was made only by means of a prospectus forming part of the Registration Statement. A final prospectus relating to the Offering has been filed with the SEC. Copies of the final prospectus may be obtained from D. Boral Capital LLC, 590 Madison Avenue, 39th Floor, New York, NY 10022, at +1 (212) 970-5150.

This press release shall not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any of the securities described herein, nor shall there be any sale of these securities in any state or other jurisdiction in which such offer, solicitation or sale would be unlawful prior to registration or qualification under the securities laws of any such state or other jurisdiction.

About Megan Holdings Limited

Megan is a Malaysia-based company principally engaged in the development, construction, and maintenance of aquaculture farms and related works. Since its inception in 2020, the Company has strived to establish itself as a trusted and experienced provider of shrimp farm related maintenance services in Malaysia. Complementary to its upgrading and maintenance services, Megan also assist customers with the design and development of new farms, including the development and construction of a shrimp hatchery center in Semporna, Sabah, and the development of a 111-acre shrimp farm in Tawau, Sabah, Malaysia. Megan also assists customers in sourcing building materials and machineries available for rental for use on their farms, positioning itself as a one-stop center for aquaculture and agriculture needs. For more information, please visit the company’s website: https://www.meganmezanin.com/.

Forward-Looking Statements

Certain statements in this announcement are forward-looking statements, including, but not limited to, the Company’s proposed Offering. These forward-looking statements involve known and unknown risks and uncertainties and are based on the Company’s current expectations and projections about future events that the Company believes may affect its financial condition, results of operations, business strategy, and financial needs. Investors can find many (but not all) of these statements by the use of words such as “believe”, “plan”, “expect”, “intend”, “should”, “seek”, “estimate”, “will”, “aim” and “anticipate” or other similar expressions in this prospectus. The Company undertakes no obligation to update or revise publicly any forward-looking statements to reflect subsequent occurring events or circumstances, or changes in its expectations, except as may be required by law. Although the Company believes that the expectations expressed in these forward-looking statements are reasonable, it cannot assure you that such expectations will turn out to be correct, and the Company cautions investors that actual results may differ materially from the anticipated results and encourages investors to review other factors that may affect its future results in its registration statement on Form F-1 and other filings with the SEC.

For media inquiries, please contact:

Megan Holdings Limited

Investor Relations Department
Email: info@meganmezanin.com

In this context, stocks with substantial insider stakes can be particularly appealing as they often indicate confidence in the company's long-term prospects and alignment of interests between management and shareholders.

Bredband2 i Skandinavien demonstrates significant growth potential with earnings projected to rise over 20% annually, outpacing the Swedish market's 13.1%.
